tasks.content: Created comprehensive tests for all src/tui components (atoms, molecules, organisms, core)
Fixed key event handling across Input, ExtensionInput, Loader, Terminal, etc.
Fixed test expectations for Badge, Box, Text, ProgressBar, Toast, DynamicBorder, I18n export
Fixed keybindings mock inconsistencies in multiple molecule tests (select-list, settings-list, tree-view, etc.)
Address remaining failures: editor, command-palette, context-menu, markdown, tui, countdown-timer, tree-selector, session-selector, etc.
Run full suite and ensure 100% pass
